profile_summary: Fictiv — digital manufacturing marketplace ('AWS of manufacturing'). Customer CAD/IP under NDA transits the platform out to a global partner network (China/India/Japan/Mexico) under EAR/ITAR. ~400 staff; Node/TS/GraphQL on AWS; acquired by MISUMI (Apr 2025). Demo spine: customer design IP + export-controlled data leaving offshore, plus secrets/PCI/supplier-payout/HR, with a precision story on manufacturing identifiers shaped like PANs/SSNs.
pending: Optional: add a MISUMI (parent) post-acquisition integration email carrier — Japan-based data flow.
Optional: add a real CAD/drawing document carrier (.pdf via the pdf skill) to make the design-IP leak visual, not just prose.
Confirm with prospect whether internal coordination is Slack or Teams; swap the two Slack carriers if Teams.

decision_log.note: Generated full POC: 7 carriers, 32 plants (19 straightforward / 6 FP near-miss / 7 FN-evasive). Lead = customer design-IP + EAR/ITAR export marking to a Shenzhen partner. Scanned via Nightfall playground: 100% precision on near-misses, 76.2% recall; design_ip/export_control_marking are not_integrated (coverage-gap talking point). Fixed generator data-validity bugs surfaced by scan (GB IBAN layout, valid FRB routing prefix, India PAN holder-type char, geographic phone).
